title: DER targeting control room
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Torpedo_Sphere_DER_targeting_control_room.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]] DER targeting control room]]

'''Dedicated Energy Receptor (DER) targeting control rooms''' were located in several tiers below the hull centerline of a [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]].

The operators of each room coordinated the use of [[Dedicated energy receptor/Legends|dedicated energy receptors]] to locate weak spots in a planetary shield and the firing of the four torpedo tubes clustered around the facility when a weak spot was identified.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
